subheadline: Every release made the next TYPO3 project faster to ship — from the Fluid 5 rewrite to per-page theme presets in the current 2.6 line.

items.title: Fluid 5 component library
items.content: The big rewrite: 49 strict Fluid 5 components — 17 atoms, 28 molecules, 4 layout primitives — became the foundation under every content element. Consistency stopped being a code-review hope and became architecture.

items.title: Ten house theme presets
items.content: Aurora, Marine, Forest, Ember, Bloom, Lagoon, Gold, Midnight, Blossom, and Citrus joined the five ui.shadcn.com presets — fifteen complete designs on OKLCH tokens with dark mode, ready to ship.

items.title: Seeder services
items.content: The styleguide and starter seeders became dedicated services — workspaces-safe, idempotent, and covered by functional tests. A full demo site became a one-command habit.

items.title: Per-page theme presets
items.content: The release that changes theming in TYPO3: any page subtree can run its own preset, inherited down the rootline and switched at runtime. The seeded styleguide shows off a different theme on every chapter page.
